creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Heino Tiedemann wrote:

> Roman Bogorodskiy <novel@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> 
> > Hi,
> >
> > Could you please describe how you installed easytag (from port, package,
> > etc)? Also, it would be interesting to see output of 'ldd' for easytag.
> 
> Yes, I installed it from ports (I reinstalled it today with
> portmaster).
> 
> 
> 
> ldd /usr/local/bin/easytag
> /usr/local/bin/easytag:

[stripped ldd output]

Thanks for the ldd output, it looks alright at the first glance.

Could you please re-compile easytag '-g' to produce a proper backtrace
for easytag (with function names etc)?

Sorry for inconvenience,

Roman Bogorodskiy
